props.content: ABOUT US
Experience the brilliance with us

Welcome to Elior Jewel, where simplicity meets sophistication. We understand that diamonds are a reflection of your unique identity, so here we are to offer what you deserve. We curate pieces that incorporate the essence of understated elegance, celebrating the beauty in simplicity. Each design is a testament to our belief that LESS IS TRULY MORE, perfect for expressing love, commitment, and appreciation. Crafted in solid gold and ethically sourced Lab Grown Diamonds, Elior offers a beautiful balance between trend-led modern and timeless minimalistic designs — all at an accessible price point.
Elior Advantage

We are direct to consumer brand and source the best diamonds from our parent firm Kay Vee Gems based in diamond capital Surat, which means you pay much lesser than other retailers for finest quality jewels, eliminating all the mediatory costs, to provide you the best and affordable jewelry. When you choose Elior, you ’re not just investing in a piece of jewelry for yourself or your loved ones, but are becoming a part of a movement towards sustainable and ethical future that values beauty as well as nature in equal measure.
Brand Vision

Our founder, Mr. Hemal Dholakia, is driven by one goal – to create luxury yet affordable jewelry for all. Elior aspires to make people feel empowered and precious; as you sparkle the brightest when YOU are YOU. We have finest conflict-free jewelry for every personality and occasion for you to choose from. The new generation of diamonds is here and we are all set to enter this futuristic world of conscious luxury.
Our Promise

items: Timeless designs — a diamond is forever

props.heading: ABOUT USDFGG
props.content: Love in diamonds located amid The Diamond City of India, Surat is a hub of explicit design and rare shades of diamonds. For over 40 years, our family has become a part of various families and their beautiful stories. We are a diamond manufacturing and designing unit that strives to give a captivating combination of hue, saturation, and brilliance that cannot be duplicated. Our gems are a symbol of love and commitment. With sparkle, incredibly designed shapes with different shades of rare colors. The precision of our cuts and the elegant craftsmanship of our artisans is our mastered tool. The choice of the stone reflects the kind of personality, the color signifies the intensity of emotions and the cuts on it give the reflection of the overall facets of love.

props.heading: VISION
props.content: Our vision lies in adding souls to the stones. Every jewel is a statement of raw and real stories rooted in deep sentiments. We believe that every stone narrates a story and our artisans give it a shape through gemstones and diamonds. Our jewelry is a beautiful creation of love and commitment and our artisans hallmark it with trust to adds "forever" to it.

props.heading: RUSHIT PATEL (FOUNDER & MANAGING DIRECTOR) fdgg
props.content: Meet the visionary behind Love in Diamonds, Mr. Rushit Patel. With over two decades of diverse business expertise, his true passion lies the world of diamonds. Hailing from the renowned diamond city of India and enriched by his experiences across African countries, he holds an unwavering fascination for the captivating allure of diamonds. Endowed with an impeccable eye for gems, Mr. Patel sees beyond mere stones, recognizing them as vessels of emotion that reflect the wearer's unique essence. From the elegance of classic cuts to the breathtaking brilliance of vibrant hues, he relentlessly pursues perfection in every facet. Fueled by boundless creativity and an unwavering commitment to excellence, Mr. Patel stands as a true luminary in the field. At Love in Diamonds, he ensures that each jewel is not just a creation, but a masterpiece crafted from the heart to resonate deeply with your soul.

tab-content.heading: Established in 2017
tab-content.content:
Our brand represents elegance and craftsmanship in fine jewelry. We specialize in designing timeless pieces that reflect beauty and sophistication.

We are constantly innovating to deliver high-quality jewelry that blends tradition with modern design, ensuring every creation tells a unique story.

tab-content.heading: Our Visionary Mission
tab-content.content: To provide the world with ethically sourced, masterfully cut diamonds that symbolize the most precious moments in life. We strive for excellence in every facet of our business.

tab-content.heading: Looking Forward
tab-content.content: Our goal is to become the global benchmark for luxury and trust in the diamond industry, fostering lifelong relationships with our clients through transparency and art.

props.heading: THE JOURNEY OF VK JEWELS & THE BIRTH OF KOHIRA
props.content: Kohira's story is rooted in the rich legacy of VK Jewels, a name synonymous with craftsmanship, innovation, and integrity in the gold jewellery manufacturing industry. Our journey began in 1993, when VK Jewels was established as a silver jewellery manufacturing unit. With a dedication to excellence and a passion for design, VK Jewels quickly became a trusted name in the industry. By 2013, VK Jewels had ventured into the global market, exporting fine jewellery to countries around the world. As we entered 2023 we added this jewel to the crown, Kohira our exclusive brand of lab-grown diamond jewellery. Kohira represents the perfect fusion of tradition and innovation, inspired by the legendary Kohinoor Diamond. Kohira now operates 13 physical stores across India, along with our official online store kohira.com.

props.heading: VISION
props.content: To become the most trusted B2C brand for jewellery consumers in the lab-grown diamond jewellery segment by consistently delivering quality products, adhering to sound policies and ethical practices, conducting effective promotions, and establishing a strong global presence.

props.heading: MISSION
props.content: At Kohira, our mission is to transform dreams into reality by elevating aspirations through the creation of exquisite lab-grown diamond jewellery.

props.heading: TERMS AND CONDITIONS
props.content: These terms and conditions apply to Web site located at www.elvee.in and It is a basic terms and condition and please it carefully. By using the site, you agree to be bound by these TERMS AND CONDITIONS.

terms.heading: PRODUCT AVAILABILITY
terms.content: All of our jewelry is designed and manufactured on-site. We develop new designs by brand wise such as modern jewelleries, high fashion jewelleries occasional oriented jewellery, plain gold jewelleries at every months. These new designs will appear on our website also we present new products on gem and jewellery exhibitions at india and international sectors.

terms.heading: INFORMATION ON OUR SITE
terms.content: We make every effort to ensure that our online catalog is as accurate and complete as possible. To allow you to view our pieces in full detail, some pieces may appear larger or smaller than their actual size and weight in our product images; and since every computer monitor is set differently, size may vary slightly.

terms.heading: RETURN POLICY
terms.content: We committed to complete customer satisfaction. We take pride in the quality and workmanship of our merchandise manufactured in our state-of-the-art facility, and we are confident that you will be completely satisfied. The contents of the package must be in their original condition and secure within the box. For your security do not indicate the contents of the package on the exterior of the box.

terms.heading: SHIPPING POLICY
terms.content: All of our shipments will be delivered using Indian Courier as well as international couriers. All custom orders will be shipped the following day when your order is completed.

terms.heading: LIMITED WARRANTY
terms.content: Our guarantee is simple and straightforward. If something is wrong due to faulty workmanship, we take care of it. It's a fair way of doing business. That being said, precious metals erode and stones can become damaged over time. When normal wear occurs, repairs can be done in house by our expert staff at the normal repair fee. Any work performed by a jeweler other than Elvee automatically voids the warranty. It is the responsibility of the customer to maintain insurance against loss or damage not covered by the warranty.

props.text: * The policy of terms and condition will be change after you cover the membership and above policy is consider as basic policy for non-membership customers.

props.heading: Terms and Conditions
props.content: By using this website, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to these terms and conditions. If you have any questions or concerns, please contact us.

terms.heading: Acceptance of Terms
terms.content: By accessing and using this website, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please refrain from using our website.

terms.heading: Intellectual Property
terms.content: All content on this website, including but not limited to text, images, logos, and designs is the intellectual property of Elior Jewel. You may not use, reproduce, or distribute any content without our explicit consent.

terms.heading: Product Descriptions
terms.content: We strive to provide accurate product information; however, we do not warrant that the content on the website is accurate, complete, or error-free. We reserve the right to correct any errors or omissions and to update any product information at any time without any prior notice.

terms.heading: Order Acceptance
terms.content: All orders are subject to our acceptance and availability. We reserve the right to refuse any order for any reason, including but not limited to availability, product pricing, or errors in product information.

terms.heading: Pricing and Payment
terms.content: All prices are listed in Indian rupees. We reserve the right to change prices at any time without notice. We accept payments through debit cards, credit cards, net banking and secure third party payment gateway RazorPay, and we do not store your payment information.

terms.heading: Shipping and Returns
terms.content: Please refer to our Shipping and Returns policy for information on delivery times, shipping costs, and our return/exchange process.

terms.heading: User Conduct
terms.content: You agree not to engage in any activity that may disrupt or interfere with the functioning of the website. This includes but is not limited to hacking, unauthorized access, or distribution of harmful code.

terms.heading: Privacy Policy
terms.content: Your privacy is important to us. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

terms.heading: Governing Law
terms.content: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. Any disputes arising from these terms will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in India.

terms.heading: Changes to Terms
terms.content: We reserve the right to update or modify these terms and conditions at any time without prior notice. It is your responsibility to review this page periodically for changes.

props.text: By using this website, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to these terms and conditions. If you have any questions or concerns, please contact us at Ph: +91 8866937682

props.heading: Terms & Conditions
props.content: Welcome to Diamondzine!

terms.heading: iFrames
terms.content: Without prior approval and written permission, you may not create frames around our Webpages that alter in any way the visual presentation or appearance of our Website.

terms.heading: Content Liability
terms.content: We shall not be hold responsible for any content that appears on your Website. You agree to protect and defend us against all claims that is rising on your Website. No link(s) should appear on any Website that may be interpreted as libelous, obscene or criminal, or which infringes, otherwise violates, or advocates the infringement or other violation of, any third party rights.

terms.heading: Your Privacy
terms.content: Please read Privacy Policy

terms.heading: Reservation of Rights
terms.content: We reserve the right to request that you remove all links or any particular link to our Website. You approve to immediately remove all links to our Website upon request. We also reserve the right to amend these terms and conditions and it's linking policy at any time. By continuously linking to our Website, you agree to be bound to and follow these linking terms and conditions.

terms.heading: Removal of links from our website
terms.content: If you find any link on our Website that is offensive for any reason, you are free to contact and inform us any moment. We will consider requests to remove links but we are not obligated to or so or to respond to you directly. We do not ensure that the information on this website is correct, we do not warrant its completeness or accuracy; nor do we promise to ensure that the website remains available or that the material on the website is kept up to date.

terms.heading: Disclaimer
terms.content:
To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, we exclude all representations, warranties and conditions relating to our website and the use of this website. Nothing in this disclaimer will:

• limit or exclude our or your liability for death or personal injury;
• limit or exclude our or your liability for fraud or fraudulent misrepresentation;
• limit any of our or your liabilities in any way that is not permitted under applicable law; or
• exclude any of our or your liabilities that may not be excluded under applicable law.

The limitations and prohibitions of liability set in this Section and elsewhere in this disclaimer: (a) are subject to the preceding paragraph; and (b) govern all liabilities arising under the disclaimer, including liabilities arising in contract, in tort and for breach of statutory duty.

As long as the website and the information and services on the website are provided free of charge, we will not be liable for any loss or damage of any nature.

props.heading: Privacy Policy
props.content: At Diamondtine, accessible from https://www.diamondtine.com, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Privacy Policy document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by Diamondtine and how we use it.

terms.heading: Consent
terms.content: By using our website, you hereby consent to our Privacy Policy and agree to its terms.

terms.heading: Information we collect
terms.content: The personal information that you are asked to provide, and the reasons why you are asked to provide it, will be made clear to you at the point we ask you to provide your personal information. If you contact us directly, we may receive additional information about you such as your name, email address, phone number, and the contents of the message.

terms.heading: How we use your information
terms.content: We use the information we collect in various ways, including to: Provide, operate, and maintain our website; Improve, personalize, and expand our website; Understand and analyze how you use our website; Develop new products, services, features, and functionality; Communicate with you for customer service or marketing purposes; and prevent fraud.

terms.heading: Log Files
terms.content: Diamondtine follows a standard procedure of using log files. These files log visitors when they visit websites. The information collected includes internet protocol (IP) addresses, browser type, Internet Service Provider (ISP), date and time stamp, and possibly the number of clicks.

terms.heading: Cookies and Web Beacons
terms.content: Like any other website, Diamondtine uses 'cookies'. These cookies are used to store information including visitors' preferences, and the pages on the website that the visitor accessed or visited to optimize the users' experience.

terms.heading: Third Party Privacy Policies
terms.content: Diamondtine's Privacy Policy does not apply to other advertisers or websites. Thus, we are advising you to consult the respective Privacy Policies of these third-party ad servers for more detailed information. It may include their practices and instructions about how to opt-out of certain options.

terms.heading: CCPA Privacy Rights (Do Not Sell My Personal Information)
terms.content: Under the CCPA, among other rights, California consumers have the right to: Request that a business that collects a consumer's personal data disclose the categories and specific pieces of personal data that a business has collected about consumers; Request that a business delete any personal data; and Request that a business that sells a consumer's personal data, not sell the consumer's personal data.

props.text: If you have additional questions or require more information about our Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact us.
